title: Expeditors International: Best Nearby Cap-Gain Freight Forwarder Stock
text: This is an article about stock prices more than about international transportation technologies, which have been extensively considered by those with appropriate expertise. 21st Century advances in 20th-century transportation practices received a severe jolt in 2020 from the Covid-19 pandemic. New profitable approaches under development are still being improved.

title: Expeditors: Potential Share Price Volatility Might Provide Buying Opportunities
text: Expeditors' expertise in supply chain management has been well rewarded as supply chains have been disrupted by the impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic. The super profits Expeditors has enjoyed are likely coming to an end.

title: Why Expeditors International (EXPD) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Why Expeditors International (EXPD) is a Top Momentum Stock for the Long-Term
text: Wondering how to pick strong, market-beating stocks for your investment portfolio? Look no further than the Zacks Style Scores.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: 3 Transport-Services Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Concerns
text: Inflation and the related economic uncertainty are hurting the Zacks Transportation-Services industry's prospects. However, stocks like EXPD, HUBG and ULH appear better positioned to escape the industry challenges.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - December 2022 Results
text: The 4 factor dividend growth portfolio was launched on November 1st, 2022, and is thus far off to a great start. The portfolio generated 0.28% of alpha in December and continues to outpace the S&P 500 Total Return.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrats You Must Keep an Eye on in 2023
text: Keep an eye on reliable dividend payers like Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD), Exxon Mobil (XOM), Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) and W.W. Grainger (GWW) for steady income in 2023.
